.status-bar.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(248, 197, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(36, 36, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(100, 2, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
